description: Signature practice in at least two different scribal hands. Names mentioned in the signatures include: Yeshuʿa b. Yiṣḥaq Barhūn and David b. Saʿadya Jabbān(?) (גבאן). There is also a variety of text in Arabic script that requires further examination, possibly from a previously stage of paper usage.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
